modding_relevance: Service quests, deity/reputation quests, Story Manager receivers, faction/quest milestone signals
preferred_validation: local plugin data plus CK Wiki
notes: Check start-game-enabled, run-once, aliases, scripts, stages, and event binding.

modding_relevance: Guild membership, crime scope, combat reaction, ownership and rank signals
preferred_validation: local master data plus UESP/CK
notes: Ranks and crime tabs need local extraction before implementation.

modding_relevance: Actor type, location type, vendor categories, magic tags, offering and condition gates
preferred_validation: local master data plus CK Wiki
notes: Keywords are metadata; behavior comes from consuming systems.

modding_relevance: Blessings, neglect, boons, conditions, UI-visible active effects
preferred_validation: local master data plus CK Wiki
notes: Validate archetype, casting type, hide-in-UI, conditions, and keywords.

modding_relevance: Ability spells, blessing spells, disease spells, powers
preferred_validation: local master data plus CK Wiki
notes: Most persistent mod boons should be Ability spells with conditioned effects.

modding_relevance: Origin detection, race variants, vampire normalization, beast-form deferral
preferred_validation: local master data plus UESP
notes: Example origin-index columns are project-specific; verify against your own mod scripts.

modding_relevance: Boons and neglect touching stats, skills, resistances, regen, AI data
preferred_validation: local master data plus UESP/CK
notes: Use AV names carefully; not every AV behaves like a normal stat.

modding_relevance: Sacred places, hold/community spaces, dungeon/temple/wilderness categorization
preferred_validation: local master data plus CK Wiki
notes: Location keywords are often safer than cell names.

modding_relevance: Skyrim/Solstheim/new-lands scope, sacred-place filtering
preferred_validation: local master data
notes: New lands from mods can affect radiant behavior and markers.

modding_relevance: Difficulty context, dungeon scaling, clearable/dungeon signal weighting
preferred_validation: local master data plus UESP
notes: Use for contextual difficulty, not as a moral signal by itself.

modding_relevance: CK-readable mirrors, debug flags, active state, condition bridges
preferred_validation: local plugin data
notes: Globals are condition bridges, not a gameplay source of truth.

modding_relevance: Deity roster, curated record sets, offering lists, keyword fallback lists
preferred_validation: local plugin data plus CK Wiki
notes: Avoid runtime mutation when order matters.

modding_relevance: Progression gates, ability grants, transformation trees, perk-entry conditions
preferred_validation: local master data plus CK Wiki
notes: Perk entries can carry conditions and fragments; verify exact effects locally.

modding_relevance: Equipment reward effects, magnitude references, charge/cast behavior
preferred_validation: local master data plus CK Wiki
notes: Use as a magnitude/effect reference before authoring custom reward enchantments.

modding_relevance: Voice-power records and word/spell linkage
preferred_validation: local master data plus CK Wiki
notes: Useful for Dragonborn and voice-power systems; verify word and spell links.

modding_relevance: Word records used by shouts
preferred_validation: local master data plus CK Wiki
notes: Many records are technical or untranslated; inspect before player-facing use.

modding_relevance: Loot, vendor, reward, and equipment distribution
preferred_validation: local master data plus xEdit
notes: Patch carefully; leveled-list conflicts are common compatibility surfaces.

modding_relevance: Encounter population and actor distribution
preferred_validation: local master data plus xEdit
notes: Use for encounter context, not as moral meaning by itself.

modding_relevance: Leveled spell and power distribution
preferred_validation: local master data plus xEdit
notes: Inspect entries before assuming exact runtime spell availability.

modding_relevance: Named interior/exterior spaces, location attachment, encounter zones, music/context
preferred_validation: local master data plus xEdit
notes: Full cell dumps are huge; prefer focused candidate extraction.

modding_relevance: Vendor chests, loot containers, curated stored items
preferred_validation: local master data plus xEdit
notes: Vendor chests and placed containers are compatibility-sensitive.

modding_relevance: Crafting stations, beds, markers, ritual/interactable furniture
preferred_validation: local master data plus CK Wiki
notes: Workbench and interaction keyword fields are the main modding hooks.

modding_relevance: Commitment offers, shrine/cleric interactions, player-facing choices
preferred_validation: local plugin data plus CK Wiki
notes: Use quest/global/race/faction conditions rather than script-only gates.

modding_relevance: Dialogue branch conditions and result fragments
preferred_validation: local plugin data plus CK Wiki
notes: Keep player-facing text ASCII and low-friction.

modding_relevance: Event capture routing for kills, crime, location, skill, craft, infection
preferred_validation: local master/plugin data plus CK Wiki
notes: Mod-added nodes should share events for compatibility.
